channel.title: Food on Barnali's
channel.description: Recent content in Food on Barnali's

item.title: 99 Variety Dosa
item.description: Provide yourself a chance to fall in love with Dosa in 99 Variety Dosa. The dosas are prepared with a thin layer of batter (made with different proportions of lentils and rice). Later, over the base chutney, a set of spices and vegetables are added, then butter, cheese and sauces are spread appropriately to make it richer. This place provides 99 different varieties of dosas : It’s very easy to find 99 Variety Dosa in Bangalore as it’s very popular in South India.
